boundaryStatement: This campaign defines falsifiable reduced-order full-solve gates and reproducible evidence requirements; it is not a physical warp feasibility claim.
notes: Q-spoiling mechanism lanes are split into hydride/Q-disease, trapped-flux, and TLS/oxide.
Mechanism uncertainty anchors are measurement-led (`EXP-Q-020..EXP-Q-022`) and replace the prior policy-only uncertainty anchor.
Non-blocking compatibility envelope mapping lane; canonical campaign remains unchanged.
Reportable profile readiness: all mechanism uncertainty anchors satisfy source-policy constraints.

trapped_flux.thresholdDerivation: EXP-Q-003 baseline with flux-sensitivity spread ratio EXP-Q-005 / EXP-Q-004
